effect.subject: tok_ibsrela_callout_key_question_border
effect.reserved_for: key strategic questions (e.g., 'DO YOU WANT TO TRY SOMETHING DIFFERENT?')

rule_text: The rounded rectangle with white outline and transparent fill (callout.key_question.border) is reserved for key strategic questions, e.g., the 'DO YOU WANT TO TRY SOMETHING DIFFERENT?' ask.
intent: Reserve the white-outline callout device for high-level strategic questions.
summary: callout.key_question.border: rounded rectangle, white outline, transparent fill, used only for key strategic questions like 'DO YOU WANT TO TRY SOMETHING DIFFERENT?'
